title: Index.html is universal — Fenix is where personalization lives
body: I locked the decision that index.html is the same page for everyone. No content reordering, no copy changes, no section swaps per persona. Personalization scoped to Fenix chat agent plus Track 1 visual touches.
decision: index.html is universal. Personalization scoped to Fenix chat agent plus Track 1 visual touches.
open_questions: Will visitors feel the reshaping promise is fulfilled?
